description: GitHub-managed injection-molding recipe (Einstellparameter / SOLL) for article housing-A on sgm-004. The five monitored bands below are the active tolerance bands behind the recipe_* constraints. Edit + push to GitHub -> the it-evaluator GithubRecipeSource picks the new bands up at runtime (no redeploy). The IST is read at the edge; the active band is resolved centrally from this file by (article x equipment x setup). --- 2026-07-12 (v3.2.0): kept in lockstep with recipe-sgm-004-default v3.3.0. mouldTempC SOLL 50 -> 85 degC, band [40,60] -> [80,90], toleranceSource -> 'norm' (BINDING): the mould temperature is a property of the RESIN, not of the article — the same PA66-GF30 needs 80-90 degC whether it is moulded into a housing or a bracket, so this band moves with the default recipe rather than staying behind as a contradiction that would resurrect the old, wrong 50 degC the moment this article-specific recipe ever won a match. The peak/hold pressure GATE doc-strings move from inCycle==true to phaseName==HOLD to match the corrected 'when' guards in the profile (the pressure BANDS themselves are article-specific and unchanged). NOTE: this recipe matches on article 'housing-A', which the real ERP never emits (its articles are codes like _V4_14-1300-017); the equipment-scoped default recipe is the one that is actually active on sgm-004.
parkedReason:
PARKED — this recipe can NEVER match a production order, and it has never matched one. MEASURED 2026-07-12 against the FULL article master of sim-v5 PROD (.154): 222 articles, population exhausted. match.article "housing-A" DOES NOT EXIST among them. The ERP keys its articles as PART-A/B/C, WIP-*, RAW-*, _V4_*. Consequence: match never fires, the bands never resolve, and NOTHING is ever checked against this recipe — silently. It has been shipped as if it were monitoring sgm-004 since it was written. It was not. The only recipe that actually binds sgm-004 is recipe-sgm-004-default.json, which matches on equipment (sgm-004), not on article.

WHY IT IS PARKED AND NOT REPAIRED: repairing it means naming the article this recipe is FOR, and that is a product decision, not an inference. Plausible candidates exist — "PART-A" (FINISHED, "Gehaeuseoberteil komplett (Premium)") and "WIP-HOUSING-BASE" (WIP, "Gehaeuseboden unbearbeitet (Rohteil von SGM-01)") — but picking one on resemblance would be inventing a fact about the customer's product. A wrong article is worse than a parked recipe: it would silently apply PA66-GF30 bands to the wrong part and then look like it was working.

PRECONDITION TO UN-PARK: set match.article to an article_no that exists in SMProfile-Article, confirmed by the product owner. ci/check-vocab-drift.mjs then verifies it against the live article master on every run and FAILS (exit 1) if it ever goes dead again. Un-parking without that check passing is not allowed.
